items.title: Maha Shivratri Celebrations 2026
items.description: A night of deep meditation and devotion celebrating Lord Shiva Join millions worldwide in celebrating Maha Shivratri, a night of deep meditation, devotion, and transformation. Experience powerful meditations, spiritual discourses, and the divine energy of this auspicious occasion. All-night meditation and chanting Special discourse by Gurudev Live webcast for global participation Powerful group meditations

items.title: Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar's Birthday Celebration
items.description: Gurudev's 70th birthday and 45 years of The Art of Living — a global day of meditation, satsang, and seva, anchored at the International Center, Bangalore, and open to the world. Each year, millions of hearts turn toward Bangalore and toward home centres worldwide to honour Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar — teacher, humanitarian, and voice of peace. The day weaves together silent sitting, satsang, seva, and celebration in a spirit of gratitude. At The Art of Living International Center, programmes unfold through the day with space for both in-person gathering and thoughtful participation from afar. Wherever you are, you are welcome to align with the schedule, join official broadcasts when offered, and carry the st

items.title: World Meditation Day 2026
items.description: Global synchronized meditation for world peace Join the global meditation movement on World Meditation Day. Millions come together to meditate simultaneously, creating a wave of peace and positivity across the planet. Synchronized global meditation Live webcast from multiple locations Guided meditation by Gurudev Record-breaking participation

items.title: Navratri Celebrations 2026
items.description: Nine nights of devotion, meditation, and celebration Celebrate the nine nights of Navratri with special pujas, meditations, and cultural programs. Experience the divine feminine energy and spiritual transformation. Daily pujas and meditations Cultural performances Special discourses Community celebrations

items.title: International Women's Conference 2025
items.description: Global conference for women leaders and change-makers A global gathering of women leaders, change-makers, and visionaries. Explore themes of leadership, empowerment, and creating positive change in the world. Keynote addresses by global leaders Panel discussions Networking opportunities Workshops and sessions

items.title: World Culture Festival 2023
items.description: The world's largest cultural gathering celebrating unity in diversity The largest cultural gathering in history, bringing together millions of people from 180+ countries to celebrate unity in diversity through music, dance, meditation, and dialogue. 6.5 million attendees 180+ countries represented Guinness World Record for largest yoga session Performances by 8,000+ artists Presence of world leaders and dignitaries

items.title: World Culture Festival 2016
items.description: Historic cultural celebration on the banks of Yamuna A historic celebration of unity in diversity on the banks of the Yamuna River in Delhi, featuring performances, meditations, and cultural exchanges from around the world. 3.5 million attendees 155 countries represented Guinness World Record achievements Performances by thousands of artists

items.title: World Culture Festival 2011
items.description: Global celebration of unity and diversity A celebration of global unity featuring cultural performances, meditations, and dialogues from around the world. 2.5 million attendees 150+ countries Cultural performances

items.title: World Culture Festival 2006
items.description: The first World Culture Festival The inaugural World Culture Festival, bringing together people from around the world to celebrate peace, harmony, and cultural diversity. 1 million attendees 100+ countries Inaugural celebration

items.title: Guinness World Record - Largest Yoga Session
items.description: Guinness World Record for largest yoga session Created a Guinness World Record for the largest yoga session with over 35,000 participants practicing together in a single session. 35,985 participants Guinness World Record International Yoga Day Global recognition

items.title: International Women's Conference 2020
items.description: Global conference for women leaders A global gathering of women leaders focusing on empowerment, leadership, and creating positive change in communities worldwide. 40,000+ participants 100+ countries Virtual and in-person Keynote speakers

items.title: Global Leadership Forum 2019
items.description: Global forum for leaders and change-makers A gathering of leaders from various fields to discuss global challenges and solutions, focusing on peace, sustainability, and human values. World leaders and dignitaries Panel discussions Networking sessions Action-oriented outcomes
